title: Lazy Sunday Cheese Poached in Fermented Whey
description: This low-sodium-friendly Lazy Sunday British dish features cheese poached in fermented whey for a tender and flavorful treat.
instructions: Place the cheddar cheese and fermented whey in a small saucepan over low heat.
Stir until the cheese is completely melted and fully incorporated into the fermented whey.
Reduce heat to very low, allowing the mixture to gently warm without boiling.
Cook for about 10 minutes, or until you see slight bubbling but no large bubbles appear.
